name: Dusty Slay
bio: Dusty Slay is an American stand-up comedian from Opelika, Alabama, who performs in a trucker hat and tinted glasses with a blue-collar storytelling style drawn from growing up in a trailer park and working as a pesticide salesman. A former Charleston open-miker who moved to Nashville, he broke through with appearances on The Tonight Show and Netflix's The Standups. His Netflix hours Workin' Man and Wet Heat arrived in 2024 and 2025, and he co-hosts the Nateland Podcast with Nate Bargatze.

timeline.ev: Commits to stand-up in Charleston, South Carolina
Named one of Variety's 10 Comics to Watch
Appears in season three of Netflix's The Standups
Releases first Netflix hour, Workin' Man
Releases second Netflix hour, Wet Heat

accolades: Two Netflix hours, Workin' Man and Wet Heat

specials.t: Being Poor in the Trailer Parks

bits.yt_title: The Trash Ditch | Dusty Slay: Workin' Man | Netflix Comedy Special
